---
---

# Explanation for Stakeholders

> This initiative aims to create a robust, scalable Python package that will
> serve as a unified interface for all AI/ML and computer vision activities in
> the Subsea division.
>
> The package will abstract the complexity of accessing
> and managing large volumes of subsea media data (images, videos, reports)
> across multiple cloud and on-premises platforms.
> 
> By enabling distributed
> processing and standardized workflows, the package will:
>
> - **Accelerate project delivery**
>   by simplifying data access and experiment management.
>
> - **Improve efficiency and reproducibility**
>   in handling massive, continuously growing datasets.
>
> - **Foster collaboration**
>   through shared tools, documentation, and best practices.
>
> - **Ensure compliance**
>   with Petrobras’ security and governance standards.
>
> - **Lay the foundation for expansion**
>   to other divisions, multiplying the impact across the company.
>
> The project will be piloted with four current subsea CV projects, with clear
> metrics for adoption, usability, and technical success.

::: {.callout-note}
Lessons learned will guide future scaling and adoption.
:::
